notes: Ambient occlusion outputs are intentionally omitted.
The generated Falcor module uses StandardMaterialInstance as its BSDF implementation.
Exact MaterialX coat/sheen layering is not represented in Falcor's StandardBSDFData and is therefore approximate.
Per-hit alpha cutout integration is not generated here; opacity is exposed and the manifest alphaMode is set for host-side handling.

The converter now preserves all analyzed graph outputs/resources/parameters in availableOutputs, graphTextures, and graphConstants, even when only a subset is mapped into the generated Falcor material.
